title: Add carriage return to log message when using --tty flag
body:
Add a raw text formatter for logrus to be used when terminal is in raw
mode (i.e. when allocating a pseudo-TTY for the container). The raw text
formatter terminates the log messages with the corret \r\n sequence.

Fixes #961

comments.body: I think we're actually terminating with `\n\r` with this, but if it works and the code is simpler I'm absolutely fine with that. LGTM.

:pushpin: Commit 48d910e has been approved by `rhatdan`
